data.content:
XYZ Bank working hours typically vary by branch, but most generally operate from **9:00 AM to 5:00 PM**, Monday to Saturday. Some branches may also be open on Sundays. 

For accurate timings of your specific branch, I recommend checking the 'Branch Locator' on our website or contacting customer support. 

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
How much will 5,000/month grow to in 10 years at 12%

If you invest ₹5,000 per month for 10 years at an annual interest rate of 12%, it will grow to approximately **₹1,161,695.38**.

_Disclaimer: Educational purposes only._
